privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what data Gamely collects, why we collect it, and the choices you have. Gamely is a free daily game and works without an account.

sections.heading: Data We Collect
paragraphs: Gamely has no user accounts and never asks for your name, email or password. We process only what the game needs to run and, with your consent, what we use to measure traffic and show ads.
list: Local game progress and stats stored in your browser (localStorage).
An anonymous session token used to count daily results.
Your language preference and cookie consent choices.
Standard technical data sent by your browser, such as IP address and user agent, processed for security and to serve the site.
With consent: analytics events (Google Analytics 4) and advertising data (Google AdSense).

sections.heading: Purpose of Processing
paragraphs: We use this data to deliver the daily challenge, remember your progress and settings, keep the service secure, understand which modes are popular, and fund the site through advertising.

sections.heading: Cookies and Analytics
paragraphs: Strictly necessary cookies and local storage are always active so the game works. Analytics and advertising cookies are only set after you consent in the cookie banner. You can change your choice at any time via Cookie settings.
For details on each category, see our Cookie Policy.

sections.heading: Data Retention
paragraphs: Local progress and stats stay on your device until you clear your browser storage. Anonymous session and aggregate result data are kept only as long as needed for the daily challenge and basic statistics. Analytics and advertising data are retained according to Google's policies.

sections.heading: Your Rights
paragraphs: Depending on where you live, you can ask us to access, correct, delete or restrict processing of your personal data, and you can withdraw consent for analytics and advertising at any time.
list: Withdraw or change cookie consent using Cookie settings in the footer.
Clear local game data by clearing your browser storage.
Contact us to exercise any other applicable rights.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For any privacy questions or requests, contact us at mr.fanitin@gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Gamely you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By accessing or using Gamely you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

sections.heading: Acceptable Use
paragraphs: Gamely is a free game for personal, non-commercial use. Use it lawfully and do not disrupt or abuse the service.
list: Do not attempt to disrupt, overload or gain unauthorized access to the service or its infrastructure.
Do not scrape, copy or redistribute game data or content for commercial purposes.
Do not use automated tools to manipulate results or statistics.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: Game data is provided by IGDB. Game titles, artwork and trademarks belong to their respective owners. Gamely is not affiliated with Sony, Microsoft or Nintendo.

sections.heading: Disclaimer of Warranties
paragraphs: Gamely is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free or that game data will be accurate.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Gamely and its operator are not liable for any indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, the service.

sections.heading: Changes to These Terms
paragraphs: We may update these Terms from time to time. The effective date and version above indicate the current revision. Continued use of Gamely after changes means you accept the updated Terms.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Gamely uses cookies and similar local storage, and how you can control them.

sections.heading: What Are Cookies
paragraphs: Cookies and local storage hold small bits of data in your browser. Gamely uses them to run the game, remember your settings and, with your consent, to measure traffic and show ads.

sections.heading: Cookie Categories
paragraphs: We group cookies and storage into three categories:
list: Strictly necessary: Laravel session, security (CSRF), your language and local game progress. Always on - the game cannot work without them.
Analytics: Google Analytics 4, used only with your consent to understand which modes are played and how to improve them.
Advertising: Google AdSense, used only with your consent to show and measure ads. When off you may still see non-personalized ads.

sections.heading: Storage Duration
paragraphs: Necessary session cookies last for your browsing session, while preferences and game progress persist in local storage until you clear them. Analytics and advertising cookies follow Google's own retention periods.

sections.heading: Managing Consent
paragraphs: When you first visit Gamely you choose which non-essential cookies to allow. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time using Cookie settings in the footer.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.description: Gamely uses cookies to keep the game running. With your consent we also measure traffic and show ads - you decide what's on.

modal.title: Cookie Preferences
modal.description: Choose how Gamely uses cookies and storage. Strictly necessary cookies are always on so the game works.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: Laravel session, security (CSRF), your language and local game progress. Required for Gamely - stored only on your device.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Google Analytics 4. Helps us understand which modes people play and how to make them better.

ads.title: Advertising
ads.description: Google AdSense. Shows ads and measures their performance. When off you may still see non-personalized ads.

how_to_play.intro: Guess the game using attributes as hints. The indicators show how close your guess was to the solution.
how_to_play.infinite_hint: You have unlimited attempts. Keep guessing until you find the answer!
how_to_play.partial_match: Partial match (e.g., one of the genres).
how_to_play.close_match: Close match. ▲ means the answer is higher.
how_to_play.hints_info: A new hint is revealed every 4-5 attempts.

hints.unlock_in: {count} more to unlock | {count} more to unlock

personal_stats.focus_hint: Pick a mode to see its chart
